ocr.text: In the analysis of diagnostic test volume growth for Abbott Laboratories within the healthcare services and medtech sector from
2019 to 2024, the data reveals significant trends in both revenue and market share. For the year 2019, the total diagnostic tests
amount to $500M with a market share of 25.0%. The following year, 2020, shows an increase in the amount to $550M,
representing a year-over-year (YoY) change of 10.0% and a slight rise in market share to 26.0%. In 2021, the diagnostic tests
amount further escalates to $600M, maintaining a YoY change of 9.1% and increasing the market share to 27.0%.
DiagnosticTests  Amount($M)  YoYChange(%)  MarketShare(%)  ForecastedGrowth  TotalVolume
750  7.1  30.0  150  Total  AverageYoYChange  GrowthRate  CAGR(%)  2020-2024  8.4  7.2  29.5  Total
The trend continues in 2022 with the diagnostic tests amount reaching $650M, reflecting an 8.3% YoY change and a market
share of 28.0%. In 2023, the total amount increases to $700M, with a YoY change of 7.7% and a market share of 29.0%.
Projecting into 2024, the diagnostic tests amount is forecasted to reach $750M, with a YoY change of 7.1% and an anticipated

market share of 30.0%. 

The total volume across the years shows a consistent upward trajectory, with the total volumes for each
year recorded as 100 in 2019, 110 in 2020, 120 in 2021, 130 in 2022, 140 in 2023, and a forecasted 150 in 2024. This growth
reflects a robust performance and indicates a sustained demand for diagnostic tests within the market. The average year-over-
year change from 2020 to 2024 stands at 8.4%, with a growth rate of 7.2% during this period. The compound annual growth

rate (CAGR) for the diagnostic tests from 2020 to 2024 is calculated to be 29.5%. 

Overall, the data highlights Abbott
Laboratories' strategic positioning within the diagnostic testing market, showcasing a steady increase in both revenue and
market share throughout the analyzed period. The financial figures not only indicate strong growth but also suggest that the
company is effectively capitalizing on opportunities within the healthcare landscape. The incremental growth rates, as well as
the rising market share percentages, are indicative of Abbott's competitive strength and its ability to adapt to the evolving
demands of the healthcare sector. As the company moves forward into 2024 and beyond, these trends will be critical for guiding
future investments and strategic initiatives aimed at further enhancing its market presence and financial performance in the
diagnostic testing arena.
